title: HOTOR Lunch Bags for Women & Men - Large Capacity Insulated Lunch Bag with Mutiple Pockets, Easy-Carrying & Wear-Resistant Lunch Cooler Bag for Office, Picnic, Black, 27.0×11.0×23.0 cm
features: SPACIOUS CAPACITY: This lunch bag measures 27.0×11.0×23.0 cm, striking the perfect balance between compact design and generous space. It easily fits a full meal with 2 lunch boxes, fruit, snacks, and drinks, all neatly organized in one space. You can pack everything you need for a complete and nutritious lunch with the HOTOR lunch bag.

MULTIPLE POCKETS FOR ORGANIZATION: This insulated lunch box features a practical layout with a front velcro pocket, a side mesh pocket, and an internal mesh compartment to keep your items neatly organized. Whether it's utensils, snacks, napkins, or small personal items, everything has its place and is easy to access. Stay clutter-free and prepared wherever you go.

EXCELLENT INSULATION: This lunch box for adults is made with pearl cotton and composite aluminum foil, providing outstanding insulation performance. It effectively keeps food warm and drinks cold for hours. Whether you're packing a hot lunch for work or chilled beverages for a picnic, the bag maintains the right temperature and preserves freshness throughout the day.

PREMIUM MATERIAL & EASY ACCESS: Made with 600D Oxford fabric, this adult lunchbox is water-resistant, wear-resistant, and scratch-resistant, ensuring long-lasting performance for daily use. The smooth interior lining wipes clean in seconds, making daily cleanup quick and effortless. In addition, the wide opening design allows for easy packing and quick access to your meals.

VERSATILE FOR ANY OCCASION: This lunch box with the built-in buckle strap allows you to conveniently attach it to your backpack or luggage, keeping your hands free while on the move. Whether you're commuting or exploring outdoors, it's the ideal companion for meals on the go. Perfect for work, picnics, travel, or daily errands, this lunch cooler bag adapts to your lifestyle with ease.
